INTRVNS_MDCTN_ADMSN_CD Other: IV Medications (Admission) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was receiving IV medications. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
598 INTRVNS_MDCTN_DSCHRG_CD INTRVNS_MDCTN_DSCHRG_CD Other: IV Medications (Discharge) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was receiving IV medications. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
599 VASOACTV_ADMSN_CD VASOACTV_ADMSN_CD
